Interface ITrafficDataManager

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides editing capabilities for creating or deleting dynamic traffic files.

[Guid("DD1AE245-B211-4502-89D4-B880BB10701D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITrafficDataManager

Methods

ConvertTMCToKey(string)

Converts a TMC string to a unique integer key value.

uint ConvertTMCToKey(string tmcCode)

Parameters

tmcCode string

Returns

uint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DeleteData(string, DateTime)

Deletes all dynamic traffic files in the specified folder which are older than the specified cutoff date.

void DeleteData(string feedFolderPath, DateTime utcCutoffDate)

Parameters

feedFolderPath string
utcCutoffDate DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

Insert(uint, IDoubleArray) 

void Insert(uint key, IDoubleArray pTimeSliceSpeeds)

Parameters

key uint
pTimeSliceSpeeds IDoubleArray

StartEditing(DateTime, int, int, DateTime, int, esriNetworkAttributeUnits, int, int)

Starts a new edit session for tracking edits to a new dynamic traffic file.

void StartEditing(DateTime feedUTCStartTime, int estimatedKeyCount, int timeSliceCount, DateTime firstTimeSliceUTCStartTime, int TimeSliceDurationInMinutes, esriNetworkAttributeUnits speedUnits, int updateIntervalInMinutes, int feedVersionNumber)

Parameters

feedUTCStartTime DateTime
estimatedKeyCount int
timeSliceCount int
firstTimeSliceUTCStartTime DateTime
TimeSliceDurationInMinutes int
speedUnits esriNetworkAttributeUnits
updateIntervalInMinutes int
feedVersionNumber int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StopEditing(string, bool)

Stops the current edit session and writes all current edits to a new dynamic traffic file in the specified folder.

void StopEditing(string feedFolderPath, bool createCompressedFile)

Parameters

feedFolderPath string
createCompressedFile bool
